rules.title: The judgment ledger is healthy
rules.source: machinery — baseline record.judgment.schema.json + jdg check semantics (expected_state/tripwire/review_by)
rules.lesson: every sign-off, deviation, risk-acceptance, and break-glass resolves through the ledger; an expired/tripped/invalid record silently voids the rule it satisfied. A scored blocker keeps the human-judgment half from fossilizing
rules.rationale: Every sign-off, deviation, risk-acceptance, and break-glass in this catalog resolves through the ledger; an expired, tripped, or invalid record silently voids the rule it was satisfying. Making ledger health a scored blocker is what keeps the human-judgment half of the standard from fossilizing — the same reason jdg check exits 1.
rules.fix: Re-make or retire the named judgments (pipeline jdg new ... with fresh review_by; satisfy or remove tripwires); pipeline jdg check reproduces the evaluation standalone.
